commands.review_summary:
The PR accepts and resolves agent-scoped `tools.codeMode`, threads the active-agent result into code-mode catalog and embedded payload filtering, and adds focused schema/runtime coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source inspection shows the docs promise agent-level `tools.codeMode`, but the strict per-agent tools schema lacks that key and runtime resolution reads only top-level `tools.codeMode`.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor or maintainer runtime proof for a security-sensitive tool-surface change, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(code-mode): honor agent scoped code mode
target.body:
Fixes #83388.

## Problem
`agents.list[].tools.codeMode` was documented as a per-agent setting, but main rejected it in the strict per-agent schema. A schema-only fix would be worse than the original rejection because it would accept security/tool-boundary config without making it effective at runtime.

## Change and value
- Accept `agents.list[].tools.codeMode` in schema, exported types, labels, and help text.
- Resolve code mode from the active agent, with agent settings overriding top-level `tools.codeMode` defaults.
- Wire the active-agent result through catalog activation and model payload enforcement so agent-scoped code mode is not accepted as inert config.
- Preserve provider grouped tool payloads, such as Gemini `functionDeclarations`, while filtering code-mode payloads down to `exec`/`wait`.

## Who is affected
Operators using per-agent code-mode policy now get the documented behavior. Existing top-level `tools.codeMode` behavior is preserved. Agents without code mode continue to see the normal tool surface.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `agents.list[].tools.codeMode` no longer validates as accepted-but-ineffective config; the active agent's code-mode setting controls schema validation, runtime catalog activation, and payload tool-surface enforcement.

Real environment tested: Local source worktree `/home/captain/codex-workspace/tmp/openclaw-pr-83388`, rebased PR head `8e4fc0405c` on `origin/main` `4c613fbfe0`; remote GCP Crabbox validation from a fresh git clone of the same PR head `8e4fc0405c` against `origin/main` `4c613fbfe0`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.runtime-config.config.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-pi-embedded.config.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/captain/openclaw-source/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 <touched files>`
- Remote GCP Crabbox: `pnpm check:changed` on `e2-standard-8` in `us-central1-a`, lease `cbx_dbc03108e975`, with `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=6 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000`.

Evidence after fix: The schema test accepts boolean and object `tools.codeMode` on an agent while rejecting unknown nested keys; the code-mode tests show active-agent config overrides the top-level default and hides normal tools when only that agent enables code mode; the embedded-attempt runtime test shows active-agent code mode sets `openclawCodeModeToolSurface` and filters payload tools to `exec`/`wait`; the wrapper tests cover both flat OpenAI-style payload tools and grouped provider declarations.

Observed result after fix: Focused local tests on head `8e4fc0405c` passed: `zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts` 27 tests, `code-mode.test.ts` 24 tests, `openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts` 24 tests, and `attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` 41 tests. `git diff --check` passed. `oxfmt --check` passed. Remote `pnpm check:changed` on head `8e4fc0405c` selected `core, coreTests` and passed conflict markers, changelog attribution, wildcard export guards, duplicate coverage, dependency pin guard, package patch guard, core typecheck, core test typecheck, core lint, media download helper guard, runtime sidecar loader guard, import cycles, webhook body guard, pairing store guard, and pairing account guard; exit code 0.

What was not tested: No live external model/gateway API call was made. The model payload boundary is covered by the embedded-attempt runtime harness plus the stream wrapper payload tests, and the broader repo impact is covered by the remote changed gate.

## Verification
- Focused local Vitest targets listed above on head `8e4fc0405c`.
- `git diff --check`
- `oxfmt --check --threads=1 <touched files>`
- Remote GCP Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`, exit 0, on head `8e4fc0405c`.
